WeiboPro/1.0.0|sceneid:feed|uuid:5292668681978047|detail:native|contribution:0|short_video:0|st_video:1|author_mid:5292670411083601|cluster_type_status:|is_ad_weibo:0|analysis_card:page_info"}},{"type":47,"page_id":"2304445292668637609996","object_type":"media_abstract","page_title":"","type_icon":"","page_url":"sinaweibo://infopage?containerid=2304445292668637609996&containerid=2304445292668637609996&url_type=39&object_type=video&pos=2","object_id":"1022:2328825292668637609996","card_category":"media_abstract","display_name":"AI总结","total_abstract":"本视频揭秘了女生用贴纸挡脸P图的技巧，核心在于先用瘦脸功能缩小脸部，再用贴纸遮挡，达到显脸小的效果。此方法虽有些“阴招”，但非常实用，也反映出女生P图时的聪明和幽默感。","split_abstract":[{"object_type":"media_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5292909399901597","abstract_id":"5292909399048227","end_time":7000,"begin_time":0,"id":"1022:2328925292909399048227","text":"发现贴纸要放大挡脸，是因为先用瘦脸功能让脸变小","author_id":"7740247568","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5292909399901597","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909399048227","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909399048227"},{"object_type":"media_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5292909400425119","abstract_id":"5292909398786052","end_time":14000,"begin_time":7000,"id":"1022:2328925292909398786052","text":"推荐先用瘦脸瘦身再贴纸，能更好遮挡脸部并显脸小","author_id":"7740247568","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5292909400425119","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909398786052","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909398786052"},{"object_type":"media_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5292909398066121","abstract_id":"5292909399048214","end_time":23000,"begin_time":17000,"id":"1022:2328925292909399048214","text":"这方法有些“阴”，但效果极佳，展现女生的聪明才智","author_id":"7740247568","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5292909398066121","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909399048214","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909399048214"},{"object_type":"media_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5292909402521616","abstract_id":"5292909399048216","end_time":28000,"begin_time":23000,"id":"1022:2328925292909399048216","text":"将脸缩小后再贴上贴纸，即使变形也能有效遮脸","author_id":"7740247568","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5292909402521616","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909399048216","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909399048216"},{"object_type":"media_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5292909403308333","abstract_id":"5292909398786061","end_time":34000,"begin_time":28000,"id":"1022:2328925292909398786061","text":"明白为什么别人脸小贴纸不必放大，自己则需要多次放大","author_id":"7740247568","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5292909403308333","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909398786061","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909398786061"},{"object_type":"media_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5292909404356744","abstract_id":"5292909399048218","end_time":39000,"begin_time":34000,"id":"1022:2328925292909399048218","text":"评论区也证实很多人用此招，P完图常常忍俊不禁","author_id":"7740247568","display_name":"AI总结","author_mid":"5292909404356744","abstract_url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909399048218","url":"https://video.weibo.com/show?fid=1034:5292668637609996&media_abstract_fragment=1022:2328925292909399048218"},{"object_type":"media_abstract_fragment","abstract_mid":"5292909404094635","abstract_id":"5292909399048233","end_time":42000,"begin_time":39000,"id":"1022:2328
